title: IP Geotracker
description: A web application that visualizes the geolocation of an IP address on an interactive map.
problemSolved: Provides an easy way to locate IP addresses and display useful networking information.

title: Coaching Module
description: Contributed as a Full Stack Developer to an internal employee coaching platform, developing modules that support centralized workflow management and user interaction.
problemSolved: Improved employee coaching workflows by supporting centralized management, mentor-employee interactions, and coaching progress tracking.
confidentiality: Only high-level information can be shared. Brief info and tech stack

title: Graduate Tracer
description: Contributed as a Full Stack Developer to a graduate information system that tracks post-graduation outcomes through survey forms.
problemSolved: Helped develop a system that collects graduate employment data, digitizes alumni surveys, generates graduate outcome reports, and replaces manual record keeping.

title: Petsup
description: An animal food e-commerce website where users browse, add to cart, and buy products, while admins manage products and orders.
problemSolved: Digitized pet food purchasing, simplified product and order management, and provided an online shopping experience for pet owners.

title: Roadsense
description: An Android-based drowsiness detection system developed as a capstone project to promote safer driving through real-time fatigue monitoring.
problemSolved: Detects driver drowsiness to help reduce road accidents and alerts drivers before fatigue becomes dangerous.

title: Kilome
description: A mobile application-based reward system that tracks running distance and allows users to redeem essential items from partnered stores.
problemSolved: Encourages healthy lifestyles by rewarding users for physical activity while connecting them with partnered stores through a point redemption system.

title: PabilIhaw
description: A time-based cooking arcade game that immerses players in the traditional Filipino street food experience.
problemSolved: Promoted Filipino street food culture through an interactive mobile game while providing an engaging arcade-style cooking experience that challenges players' reaction time and multitasking skills.

title: Portfolio Website
description: A responsive personal portfolio website showcasing my projects, skills, experience, and an AI-powered chatbot that answers questions about me.
problemSolved: Provides a centralized platform for recruiters and visitors to explore my work, learn about my experience, and easily get in touch while demonstrating my frontend development skills.

title: Sarcasty AI Chatbot
description: An AI-powered portfolio assistant that answers questions about my skills, projects, experience, and contact information using a serverless architecture and multiple AI providers.
problemSolved: Allows visitors to ask natural language questions instead of manually browsing the portfolio, providing an interactive way to learn about my skills, projects, experience, and contact information while showcasing modern AI and serverless development.
